text: A cargo hold containing cargo such as nitrates, chlorates etc which produce oxygen under the influence of heat catches fire. How would you deal with this?

options.text: A) With this type of material, the hatches should not be battened down. The fire can only be extinguished using large quantities of water
C) Close the hatches, apply boundary cooling and allow fire to use up the oxygen and extinguish itself
D) Close the hatches and use the fixed CO2 system
